description_long: This is a rectangular bar of soap with a smooth, glossy white surface. The top face features a bold, stylized red flame graphic that covers much of the area, giving it a striking and modern appearance. The sides of the soap are a translucent reddish-brown, with abstract orange streaks running horizontally, adding visual interest and suggesting a layered or marbled composition. The edges are crisp and the corners are slightly rounded, typical of a manufactured soap bar. There are no visible brand names or text on any surface. The overall look is clean, contemporary, and visually appealing, suitable for display or use in a modern urban setting.
description: A rectangular white soap bar with a red flame graphic on top and translucent reddish-brown sides with orange streaks. The surface is smooth and glossy, with crisp edges and a modern design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the white face with the red flame graphic prominently displayed, and the clean, smooth surface.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the translucent reddish-brown side with orange streaks, and a partial view of the flame graphic on the top.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the white face and the tail end of the red flame graphic, with no additional markings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again highlights the reddish-brown side with orange streaks and the edge of the flame graphic.
attribute_packaging_design: Rectangular bar with a glossy white top featuring a bold red flame graphic, and translucent reddish-brown sides with orange streaks. The design is modern and visually striking, with no visible text.
